div.style: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-family: 'Inter', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;

p.style: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: #1a1a1a;

div.p: This is a friendly reminder that your agreement is approaching its expiration date on .
We value our partnership and would love to continue supporting your business. You can review your contract details, sign renewal terms, or get in touch with our team through your client portal.

a.style: background-color: #0d6efd; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold; display: inline-block;

div.p: If you have any questions or require custom terms, please reply directly to this email.
